task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel under Stores > Configuration > Web > Default Cookie Settings, the dropdown for 'Cookie Restriction Mode' is set to 'Yes'.
In the Magento Admin panel under Stores > Configuration > Web > Default Cookie Settings, the input field for 'Cookie Lifetime' contains the value '86400'.
In the Magento Admin panel under Stores > Configuration > Web > Default Cookie Settings, the dropdown for 'Use HTTP Only' is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Create an enabled CMS Page titled 'Privacy Policy 2026' with URL Key 'privacy-policy-2026' and content
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel under Content > Pages (or on the page creation screen), there is a page with Title 'Privacy Policy 2026', URL Key 'privacy-policy-2026', Status 'Enabled', and text present in the content editor.

task_completion.description: Update the footer copyright for the default store view
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel under Content > Design > Configuration > Edit (Default Store View) > Footer, the Copyright text area contains 'Copyright © 2026 Acme Corp. All Rights Reserved.' OR the storefront frontend footer displays this exact text.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure settings rather than CLI commands or direct database edits
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration, Content > Pages, Content > Design) rather than terminal windows executing bin/magento commands or SQL queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento application in a web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface loading the Magento Admin panel or storefront, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the changes made in the Admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for green success messages such as 'You saved the configuration.', 'You saved the page.', or 'You saved the configuration.' after making changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Magento 2.4 configuration paths: Cookie settings are located under Stores > Configuration > Web > Default Cookie Settings. Expected values are Cookie Restriction Mode = Yes, Cookie Lifetime = 86400 (which equals 24 hours), and Use HTTP Only = Yes. The CMS Page identifier must exactly match 'privacy-policy-2026'. The footer copyright setting is located under Content > Design > Configuration > Edit (Default Store View) > Footer, and the expected fragment '2026 Acme Corp' must be present in the final copyright text.
